channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How AI is supercharging drug development
item.description: Artificial intelligence accelerates drug development, and a proprietary survey shows it is driving a broader automation push.

item.title: Troy Jackson emerges as top Democratic candidate for Maine Senate seat
item.description: Democrats are uniting behind former Maine Senate President Troy Jackson to challenge Republican Senator Susan Collins this fall.

item.title: Gas prices surpass $4 per gallon amid ongoing Iran conflict
item.description: The national average gas price has climbed above $4 per gallon again, as President Trump appears ready to escalate actions.

item.title: Trump administration considers banning Chinese AI models
item.description: The Trump administration may ban advanced Chinese AI models, a move that could solidify dominance by OpenAI and others.
